blocks.text: Title Race Wednesday: Arsenal and City Both Must Deliver

Arsenal sit five points clear atop the Premier League, but City lurk. Both play simultaneously Wednesday night — Brighton and Forest are not gift fixtures. Then El Derbi Vasco lights up San Sebastián.
⚽ Copa del Rey: Athletic Club must overturn 1-0 deficit in El Derbi Vasco at Real Sociedad — 21:00
🏅 GET-ligaen playoffs begin — perennial powerhouse Storhamar open quarterfinal Game 1 at home — 18:00
